exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: No log last session — holding at 52kg. Wide overhand grip, full stretch at top, drive elbows to hips. Get this logged.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.notes: Holding at 50kg. Close neutral grip, pull to lower sternum, 1 sec pause at peak. Log all sets today.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Holding at 22kg. Rope attachment, pull to forehead, externally rotate at end. Health exercise — never skip this.

exercises.name: DB Bicep Curl
exercises.notes: Holding at 12kg. Supinate fully at top — that full rotation is what makes this effective.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Neutral grip throughout. Targets brachialis. Hit your reps and log them.
